title: psacalium calvum
intro: Psacalium calvum, also known as the "Mexican silver top" or "white daisy", is a flowering plant species native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the asteraceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which aid in reducing pain and swelling. The health benefits of Psacalium calvum include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and act as an antiseptic to prevent infections. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
